# RunHelpers

## Docs

### [RunHelpers](https://nicoviii.github.io/RunHelpers/index.md)

RunHelpers

This is a library which should help by creating build scripts for your projects in F#.
There is no real documentation for this right now. You can have a look at the api
reference, at the dependents and the use in this project to get a feeling how this is used.
There are dotnet templates available to get you started:
dotnet new -i NicoVIII.RunHelpers.Templates
dotnet new <template-name>

## API Reference

### [RunHelpers](https://nicoviii.github.io/RunHelpers/reference/runhelpers.html)

BasicShortcuts 
Builder 
Job 
Shortcuts 
Watch 
Job 
JobResult

### [RunHelpers.Templates](https://nicoviii.github.io/RunHelpers/reference/runhelpers-templates.html)

DotNet 
DotNetConfig 
DotNetOS 
Npm 
Paket 
Pnpm 
DotNetConfig 
DotNetOS
